Hons. 2025 ACADEMIC DETAILS COURSE INSTITUTE /COLLEGE BOARD/UNIVERSITY SCORE YEAR CLASS XII Delhi Public School Patna CBSE 92.6  2020 CLASS X Delhi Public School , Patna CBSE 94  2018 ,  , , ,  ,  , , Subjects / Electives Object Oriented Programming , Data Structures And Algorithms , DBMS, Operating Systems Technical Proficiency C++ Language C Programming FlaskPythonExpress.jsMongoDB Node.jsReact.js Development : Created a multi-tier system using advanced OOP techniques such as class hierarchy, method/constructor overloading , varargs, nested classes, abstract classes, interfaces , and multiple inheritance . Data Management : Handled comprehensive patient data, including status, symptoms , test results, and contact tracing, with robust exception handling and wrapper classes. Reporting : Generated detailed statistical reports at hospital, state, and country levels, highlighting key metrics like confirmed cases, recoveries , and fatalities. Designed and implemented various CPU scheduling algorithms   in C++, including First-Come-First-Served FCFS , Round Robin, Shortest Job First SJF , Multilevel Queue MLQ , and Priority Scheduling with aging, Applied OOP principles to develop reusable code through inheritance and polymorphism , enhancing flexibility and simplifying task management for better maintainability . Leveraged data structures like priority queues, queues, and vectors for efficient task handling, real-time performance , and fairness, with time slicing, preemption , and priority adjustments . Developed performance metrics for turnaround time, waiting time, and CPU utilisation , incorporating aging techniques to prevent task starvation and improve efficiency . Development : Built a fully functional management website using Flask, supporting submission , review, and publication workflows . Database Integration : Utilised SQLAlchemy for managing journal and conference submissions , and user information . UI/UX Design: Crafted a user-friendly interface with HTML and CSS for easy viewing, editing, and printing of entries. PDF Generation : Enabled PDF generation using ReportLab for printing and sharing. Full-Stack Development : Created a comprehensive Book Store application using the MERN stack MongoDB , Express.js, React, Node.js . API Integration : Developed RESTful APIs for efficient CRUD operations , ensuring robust data management with Mongoose . Responsive Design: Designed a responsive UI/UX with React and Tailwind CSS. Advanced Features: Implemented features such as book search, detail views, and interactive models to enhance the user experience .Disease Management   System - Object Oriented Programming Mar 2024 - May 2024 CPU Scheduling Algorithms Simulator - Object Oriented Programming Jul 2024 - Jul 2024 Developing a journal and conferences management website. - Web Development ,Flask Feb 2024 - Mar 2024 Book Store Project - Web Development May 2024 - May 2024               PROJECTS Contributed to the development of a graphene -based sensor for prosthetic hands, enhancing flexibility and sensitivity .
